---
title: "Image links"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
dir <- "images/jobs"
ext <- "(?i)\\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp)$"
paths <- list.files(dir, pattern = ext, full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(paths) > 0)

library(glue); library(purrr)

md <- map_chr(paths, \(p) glue("- [{basename(p)}]({p}){{target=\"_blank\"}}"))
cat(paste(md, collapse = "\n"))
```
